title: Crypto-friendly Revolut launches UK bank after regulator lifts license restrictions
message_html: Crypto-friendly Revolut launches UK bank after regulator lifts license restrictions ...
snippet: Existing Revolut customers will see no immediate changes, with the firm planning a phased migration that is expected to take a few months.
